  ok
== Task.machine.json: 7 states ==
  warn   Task.machine.json: state rolledBack always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: only Open and InProgress have transitions into the persist overlay, so priorStatus ranges over {Open, InProgress}; both priorIs* guards are present

  warn   User.machine.json: state rolledBack always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: both domain states (Active, Disabled) can enter the persist overlay, so priorStatus ranges over {Active, Disabled}; both priorIs* guards are present
